evals.prompt: I want to add a 'conversation history summarization' feature to the chat assistant: when the number of conversation turns exceeds 10, automatically compress earlier history into a summary to reduce token usage. Write me a spec first.
evals.expected_output: A feature-level Forward Spec with behavioral contracts (happy path + error scenarios), constraints & boundaries, and dependencies — not written to any file

evals.prompt: Reverse-engineer a spec for internal/orchestrator/supervisor.go — I want to understand what this supervisor actually does.
evals.expected_output: A module-level Reverse Spec extracted from the code, with suspicious logic flagged using [NOTE] tags — not written to any file

evals.prompt: I need a utility function that deduplicates a list of user-uploaded image URLs and validates their accessibility. Invalid URLs should be filtered out and logged. Write the spec first, then implement it.
evals.expected_output: A function-level Forward Spec, followed by an implementation that follows the spec
